name: Keyboard Maestro
description: Macro and workflow automation — trigger actions by hotkey, typed string, or application event

extraction.notes: NO Sparkle feed, NO version API, NO GitHub Releases. The only way to determine latest version is to scrape the main website (https://www.keyboardmaestro.com/main/) for the version string in the download link text, or download the zip and read CFBundleShortVersionString from Info.plist inside the app bundle.

download.notes: Any download path on keyboardmaestro.com serves the app zip. The primary download link uses a server-side script (DownloadFile) with a path parameter. The zip filename in the download link on the main page may include the version number (e.g. 'KeyboardMaestro-11.0.3.zip'), but this pattern may change.

changelog.notes: Changelog published on the Keyboard Maestro wiki. Must scrape the wiki page to extract version history and release notes. The page lists versions with dates and bullet-point changes.

release_date.notes: Release dates listed on the wiki changelog page alongside version numbers. Must be extracted via scraping.

notes: Paid app (one-time purchase with free trial). One of the most challenging apps to track for updates — has no programmatic version API, no Sparkle feed, and no structured release data source. The download URL does not contain the version number. The only reliable version check method is: (1) scrape the main page for the version string, (2) download the zip, or (3) check the wiki changelog. The wiki at wiki.keyboardmaestro.com/change_log is the most reliable machine-parseable source for version history.
